evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of noise-cancelling headphones under $100 — results look solid.

final_response:
For your commuting needs, the Audio-Technica QuietPoint ATH-ANC900BT is an impeccable choice at just $99. With its robust 40mm drivers delivering that signature Audio-Technica sound, plus hybrid digital Active Noise Cancelling that shields you from the chaos of public transport, this over-ear beauty brings studio-quality audio straight to your ears. Its folding design means it easily tucks away in your bag when you're not rocking out, making it the perfect travel companion.

Want something a bit cheaper? The Anker Soundcore Life Q35 at $79 offers adaptive noise cancellation and Hi-Res audio support, making your commute a sonic delight. Need something more compact? The Anker Soundcore Liberty 4 NC earbuds also come in at $79 with impressive noise cancellation and a snug fit for those on-the-go moments. Craving that punchy sound? The JBL Tune 760NC, also for $99, delivers that iconic JBL bass while keeping distractions at bay.
